home.title: Daleel
home.subtitle: Your guide to mastering ERP systems. Start your learning journey today.

hero.title: Your Guide to Mastering
hero.subtitle: We're building the first intelligent learning navigator for enterprise software. We don't create courses — we curate the best resources and organize them into clear paths.

erpGrid.title: Enterprise Systems We're Mapping
erpGrid.subtitle: Comprehensive learning paths for both technical professionals and business managers. From system configuration and setup to financial operations and process management — we cover the ERP systems most in-demand across MENA.

howItWorks.title: We Don't Create Courses.
howItWorks.subtitle: The internet is full of ERP learning resources. The problem isn't access — it's organization. We curate the best content and structure it into actionable learning paths for both technical and business professionals.
howItWorks.step1Quote: I want to become an Oracle Technical Consultant or Financial Operations Manager
howItWorks.step1Detail: Share your current experience, target role (technical or business), and timeline. We understand the MENA job market for both developers and business professionals.
howItWorks.step2Quote: We analyze thousands of resources and organize the best ones for you
howItWorks.step2Detail: No more endless YouTube tabs or scattered documentation. We filter the noise and create clear roadmaps for technical configuration, business processes, and certifications.
howItWorks.step3Quote: Learn with context, track progress, reach your career goal
howItWorks.step3Detail: Week-by-week guidance with the right resources at the right time. Whether you're configuring systems or managing financial operations.
howItWorks.problem1: 20 browser tabs of scattered tutorials and documentation
howItWorks.problem2: Outdated forum posts and technical guides from 2018
howItWorks.problem3: YouTube rabbit holes with no clear path for tech or business
howItWorks.problem4: Expensive courses that don't match MENA market needs or technical requirements
howItWorks.problem5: No idea what to learn first - technical setup or business processes?
howItWorks.solution1: Clear paths for both technical and business roles, curated by experts
howItWorks.solution2: Only the best, most current resources - technical docs and business guides
howItWorks.solution3: Week-by-week learning schedule tailored to your role
howItWorks.solution5: MENA market-focused outcomes for developers, consultants, and managers

founder.title: A Note from the Founder
founder.subtitle: Why we're building Daleel
founder.paragraph1: As professionals in the MENA region, we've all experienced the frustration of trying to learn ERP systems. You open YouTube and find thousands of videos. You search Google and get forum posts from 2015. You ask colleagues and get five different opinions on where to start.
founder.highlight: Months pass. Progress is slow. Confusion grows.
founder.paragraph2: Daleel (دليل — meaning "guide" in Arabic) was born from this frustration. We're not creating another course platform. The internet already has enough content. What's missing is clarity — a guide that tells you exactly what to learn, in what order, using the best resources available.
founder.paragraph3: We're starting with Oracle Cloud ERP because it's the most in-demand system in the Gulf region. But we're building this with you — the community will decide which ERP systems we add next.
founder.paragraph4: This is an early-stage startup. We're honest about that. But we're serious about the mission: making ERP learning accessible, structured, and career-focused for MENA professionals.
founder.teamTagline: Building from the MENA region, for the MENA region
